summary: The source contract caps n at 2^31 - 1, so every legal decimal representation has at most ten digits and cannot support an honest runtime scaling verdict.

workload_bound.source_constraint: n is between 0 and 2^31 - 1 inclusive, so its decimal representation has at most ten digits

replacement_checks.evidence: The accepted grouping loop removes three of at most ten digits per iteration, creates at most four groups, and inserts at most three separators.
Regression compares a large deterministic input set with an independent forward-grouping oracle and explicitly covers every legal digit width and each power-of-thousand transition.
